title: Micron milestone: First concrete to flow at giant computer chip factory site in NY
summary: Micron Technology has begun concrete pouring for its first semiconductor manufacturing facility in Clay, NY, marking a major milestone in what the company describes as the nation's largest chip factory project. This represents significant economic development and infrastructure investment for the region.
department_refs: Office of the Chief Innovation Officer

political_signal.description: Major private sector capital investment and manufacturing facility development aligns with regional economic development priorities and workforce opportunities
